The '''Ultra Collider''' was a [[Reactor/Legends|reactor]] produced by [[ArMek/Legends|ArMek]] for use in [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] at the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Tech-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
